title: geofencing — enums
description: Backed string enums. Uppercase for GeofenceResult (matches wire contract R3), lowercase for GeofenceMode (matches observability labels R9).

cases.name: INSIDE
cases.meaning: Reported location falls inside the fence (polygon) or within the radius. Consumer proceeds without blocking.

cases.name: OUTSIDE
cases.meaning: Reported location is outside. Consumer blocks unless override applied.

cases.name: SKIPPED
cases.meaning: Reported accuracy exceeds branch tolerance. Evaluator refused to give a verdict.

cases.name: ERROR
cases.meaning: Evaluation could not run to completion (cross-tenant, missing geometry, unexpected exception). Fail-closed.

methods.name: isBlocking(): bool
methods.description: Returns true for OUTSIDE + ERROR (fail-closed for enforcement contexts). False for INSIDE + SKIPPED.

cases.name: Polygon
cases.meaning: Branch has a `geofence_polygon`; evaluator ran point-in-polygon + distance-to-polygon.

cases.name: Radius
cases.meaning: Branch has no polygon; evaluator fell back to haversine against `location_point` compared to `geofence_radius_m`.

cases.name: NotClosed
cases.meaning: First and last vertex must be identical.

cases.name: TooFewVertices
cases.meaning: Polygon must have at least 4 points (3 unique + repeat).

cases.name: SelfIntersecting
cases.meaning: Simple polygon required — no self-crossing edges.

cases.name: TooLarge
cases.meaning: Polygon spans > 10km diameter. Beyond the tangent-plane approximation's validity zone.

cases.name: InvalidCoordinates
cases.meaning: At least one vertex has lat outside [-90, 90] or lng outside [-180, 180].
